20 On June 15, 2010, at 9:30 a.m. in Department 505, Hon. John K. Stewart presiding, the
21 || Court held a hearing in this matter to determine the admissibility of evidence, under California
22 || Code of Evidence §402, regarding plaintiff Jessie Evans’ alleged loss of employment
23 || opportunities due to public statements made by defendant USF. Plaintiff Jessie Evans was
, 24 || represented by attorneys Dan Siegel and Michael Siegel of Siegel & Yee. befendant University
25 || of San Francisco was represented by attorneys Michael Vartain and Linda Adler of Vartain Law
26 Group. |
27 At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court ordered that: :
28
1. Evans may submit evidence regarding his alleged loss of employment opportunities
Evans y. The University of San Francisco, Case No. CGC-08-473864 ;
[Proposed] Order 1

 
1 and damages due to public statements made by defendant USF;
2 2. Evans is hereby granted leave to file a Second Amended Complaint in order to allege
3 that USF breached the confidentiality provision of Evans’ employment agreement an
4 to pray for damages for lost employment opportunities resulting from the alleged
5 breach; |
6 3. Evans must file the Second Amended Complaint within 10 days of June 15, 2010;
7 4. The trial date in this matter will be continued until November 15, 2010;
8 5. USF may file any dispositive motion(s) upon receipt of Evans’ Second Amended
7 Complaint, and if such motion is filed, the motion will be heard in Department 505 at
2:30 p.m. on September 23, 2010; and |
. 6. A Status Conference in this case will be held in Department 505 a 2:30 p.m. on
13 September 23, 2010. :
15 IT IS SO ORDERED. :
